name: brotherhood-omega-website
description: Official Brotherhood Omega Dynasty Empire website

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/css dist/js && cp index.html dist/ && cp css/styles.css dist/css/ && cp js/main.js dist/js/
scripts.test: npm run build && test -f dist/index.html && test -f dist/css/styles.css && test -f dist/js/main.js && echo 'Website build validation passed'

author: Brotherhood Omega Dynasty Empire
